metadata.description: Turn your app/UI into a ~50s feature film — capture your real running app (or a mockup, or a terminal), narrated with Edge TTS, synced karaoke captions, music bed, brand framing. Free tools; one brand.yaml.

plugins.name: demo-video
plugins.description: Produce a ~50s feature film of your app/UI. `/demo-video init` scaffolds into your project; edit brand.yaml (scenes + voiceover); `/demo-video build` produces final-framed.mp4. Capture your REAL running app (Playwright: click/type/scroll), HTML mockups for unbuilt features, screen recordings, or terminal scenes (VHS) — composed with Edge TTS voiceover, karaoke captions, ducked music, and brand framing. Output 1920×1080 H.264.
